project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 App Router with React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4
build_system: npm with Next.js CLI. AGENTS.md warns that this Next.js version has breaking changes - must check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install. 2. Run npm run lint. 3. Run npm run build. Both must succeed with zero errors.
environment_constraints: Network access available for npm installs. No test framework installed. No format script. AGENTS.md warns about Next.js 16 breaking changes in node_modules/next/dist/docs/.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript with zero errors, ESLint with zero errors, build succeeds, responsive Tailwind CSS, semantic HTML, accessible components.
key_patterns: Services live in lib/ (itunes.ts, lastfm.ts). Types in lib/types.ts. Components in app/components/. Pages use App Router with async server components. API routes in app/api/. Existing error handling via lib/api-error.ts with ApiResult<T> pattern. Environment variables read directly (NEXT_PUBLIC_LASTFM_API_KEY). Glass morphism UI with CSS vars in globals.css. Image optimization via next/image. Color extraction uses client-side canvas in lib/color-extraction.ts.
directory_structure: Root: Next.js project. app/ has pages (page.tsx, track/[id], artist/[id], album/[id], discover/, dashboard/, favorites/, playlists/), components/ (~50 components), api/recommendations/. lib/ has service modules (itunes.ts, lastfm.ts) and utilities. types/ has speech-recognition.d.ts. public/ has static assets.
